dict.string: AgedCare Monitor reads health data to track resident vitals such as heart rate, blood oxygen, and step count for anomaly detection.
AgedCare Monitor writes health data to record monitoring measurements and vitals collected during care sessions.
AgedCare Monitor uses the camera for AI-powered fall detection, room monitoring, and capturing photo evidence for incident reports.
AgedCare Monitor uses the microphone for real-time audio monitoring, distress sound detection, and voice-based keyword alerts in resident rooms.
AgedCare Monitor uses speech recognition to transcribe resident audio for keyword detection such as calls for help or distress phrases.
AgedCare Monitor accesses your photo library to attach images to incident reports and care notes.
AgedCare Monitor saves captured photos and video recordings to your photo library for record-keeping.
AgedCare Monitor uses your location to identify the facility and associate alerts with the correct site.
AgedCare Monitor uses Face ID to securely authenticate staff members.
AgedCare Monitor uses the local network to communicate with facility monitoring devices and sensors.
